## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add a 5th probe to Part B (Technical Approach Self-Review) in epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md:
"Does the approach deprecate, relocate, or rename any file paths, directories, or conventions? If so, what still references the old location/name/convention? Run a codebase grep for references to any deprecated path and report the count."

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Part B contains residual-state probe with canonical phrase
  Verify: grep -q "deprecate, relocate, or rename" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] test-residual-state-probe.sh passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-residual-state-probe.sh
- [ ] Existing Part B probes still present (regression check)
  Verify: grep -q "sync loops" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md && grep -q "race conditions" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
